hero.title: Insights from the
hero.paragraph: A repository of thoughts, technical deep-dives, and narrative reflections on the journey of an astrophysics PhD student.

newsletter.title: Monthly Briefing
newsletter.desc: Get research updates directly in your orbit.

posts.title: Chasing Shadows: The Quest for Dark Matter Candidates
posts.excerpt: The universe is far more crowded than our eyes let on. Last month, while refining our computational models at the observatory, I realized that the silence between the stars isn't empty—it's heavy with the invisible.

posts.title: The PhD Paradox: Balancing Simulation and Sanity
posts.excerpt: They don't tell you that half of a PhD is waiting for code to compile and the other half is questioning your own existence. Here's how I'm learning to manage both.

posts.title: First Light: My Journey into Radio Astronomy
posts.excerpt: Radio waves are the hidden whispers of the cosmos. In this post, I break down the fundamentals of signal processing for astronomy students.

posts.title: Stardust and Silicon: Machine Learning in Space
posts.excerpt: AI is transforming astronomy. Discover how neural networks are helping researchers identify patterns hidden inside massive datasets.
